Headline: #52 Kedzie and #47 47th Temporary Reroute near Kedzie/47th
ShortDescription: 52 Kedzie and 47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Kedzie/47th, due to street blockage Kedzie/47th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#52 Kedzie and #47 47th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Kedzie/47th, due to street blockage Kedzie/47th.

Southbound #52 Kedzie buses will operate via Kedzie, 47th, California, 51st, Kedzie, Orange Line and over regular route.

Westbound #47 47 buses will operate via 47th, California, 51st, Kedzie, Orange Line and over regular route

Eastbound #47 47th buses will operate via 47th, California, 51st, Kedzie, Orange Line, Kedzie, 47th and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line Trains bypassing Grand Station
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are running, but not stopping at Grand due to police activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are running, but not stopping at Grand due to police activity.

Also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include: #65 Grand buses.
